subject: Reconstruct sub-volumes/export subtomograms crash
body:
Hi, 

I'm following the workflow for subtomogram reconstruction in Warp (tried 
1.0.9 and 1.1.0 beta). 
(https://teamtomo.org/walkthroughs/EMPIAR-10164/relion.html). Warp crashes 
and produces the output below, indicating the input string is not in the 
correct format. I've checked the .star file and everything looks correct. 
Any ideas where I'm going wrong?

Thanks,
Josh

System.FormatException: Input string was not in a correct format.
   at System.Number.ThrowOverflowOrFormatException(ParsingStatus status, 
TypeCode type)
   at System.Int32.Parse(String s)
   at Warp.Star..ctor(String path, String tableName, Int32 nrows) in

in

210
